security.description: Can adversarial instructions reach the LLM grader?

score_integrity.description: Does the system prevent IELTS band score manipulation?

fairness.description: Are clean essays and academic cybersecurity discussions preserved?

multilingual_robustness.description: Does the firewall catch Vietnamese, Chinese, and cross-lingual attacks?

obfuscation_robustness.description: Does the preprocessor decode Base64, Unicode zero-width, and spaced payloads?

operational_review.description: Are ambiguous or high-risk cases routed to human manual review?

evidence_governance.description: Are SHA256 hashes and reproducible logs preserved for audit?

content_preservation.description: Does the sanitizer preserve authentic student writing context?
